content: Vite root is ./src, not project root. Config files reference paths relative to src/
Production builds must export NODE_ENV=production before capacitor builds to strip the dev server URL from config

name: Dynamic Capacitor Config
description: Capacitor config is dynamic - reads local IP at build time for hot reload in non-production mode

content: Low-value tools: RFID only (binary check-in/check-out). High-value tools: RFID + BLE (real-time location). Toolboxes: BLE primarily.
